title: Research notebook: PM lifecycle visibility and traceability
research_question: How should ProductOS help a PM inspect one opportunity across discovery stages, gates, artifacts, and downstream readiness better than current PM and execution tools?
synthesis_hypothesis: The winning V5 wedge is not another PM drafting assistant. It is an item-first lifecycle trace that preserves what happened, why it passed, and what is ready next.
open_questions: How much delivery-stage structure should be standardized in V5.1 versus left flexible for workspace-specific adoption?
